summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AutoFlip Intelligence car dealer monitoring app. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working excellently with 122 real scraped listings from 3 dealer sources.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
All 122 listings loading from 3 sources (Cathcart Rebuilders: 51, Cathcart Used: 12, Pic N Save: 59)
Source filtering working correctly for all 3 sources
Sorting by deal score, profit, price, and mileage working
Advanced filters working (min profit, max price, min score, damage type)
Stats bar displaying correct data (18 BUY, 20 WATCH, 56 SKIP deals, $15,462 top profit)
Detail dialog opening/closing with complete profit breakdown
Profit calculations working with market value estimation
Scraping functionality working (manual trigger and status endpoints)
Mobile responsiveness working with card view
All filter parameters working correctly in backend API
Market value estimation formula working (MOCKED as expected)
Ontario fees calculation working (HST + OMVIC + MTO + Safety)
